items.title: Human remains found on Thai cargo ship attacked in Strait of Hormuz
items.desc: Human remains were found within the affected area of the ​vessel ⁠MV Mayuree Naree in the Strait of ‌Hormuz, which was attacked last month during ⁠the Middle East conflict, ⁠Thailand's Precious Shipping ​reported on ​Friday.

items.title: Unsafe levels of smog blanket 37 provinces, Mae Hong Son’s Pai district worst hit
items.desc: Toxic haze remains at critical levels across large parts of the country, with PM2.5 concentrations exceeding safety standards in 37 provinces, the Pollution Control Department (PCD) reported on Friday.

items.title: Thai regulator tightens market oversight to curb 'grey capital'
items.desc: Thailand’s ⁠Securities and Exchange ​Commission (SEC) is stepping up measures ​to curb ‌grey capital, mule accounts and investment scams, calling it a national priority.

items.title: Thai Airways stresses 2 power-bank limit per passenger
items.desc: Thai Airways International reminds passengers of a new regulation that permits each passenger to carry up to two power banks with no permission to use or charge them on board.

items.title: Thai central bank chief says no drastic policy adjustment needed at the moment
items.desc: Thailand's central bank chief ​said there was no need for a drastic ​monetary policy adjustment at the moment, ‌despite expectations of a rise in inflation driven by higher oil prices amid the war in the Middle East.

items.title: Man caught cooking dog meat at Udon Thani home
items.desc: Man caught cooking dog meat at Udon Thani home Legacy Police in Udon Thani arrested a man in Chiang Yuen subdistrict yesterday, April 2, after a Facebook post led police to his home , where officers found him cooking dog meat . Officers from Huai Luang Subdistrict Police Station went to the property at 11am. Upon arrival, they found the suspect, identified as 49 year old Gok, cooking meat in a pot for a local dish called hyoi. When questioned, the suspect reportedly admitted the meat came from a dog. According to officers, Gok said the animal had died after being hit by a vehicle. He claimed t

items.title: cTrader Store Affiliate Programme: Two revenue streams within one extended IB model
items.desc: cTrader Store Affiliate Programme: Two revenue streams within one extended IB model Legacy With the cTrader Store Affiliate Programme , Spotware introduces a new approach to affiliate marketing. Partners can now benefit from two revenue streams instead of one and expand conversion opportunities beyond broker signups, while keeping traffic aligned with their existing setup. In this model, the cTrader Store complements the IB structure – it doesn’t replace it. Two revenue streams instead of one Nothing in the current IB structure changes, the programme just builds on it. Partners earn through tw

items.title: 泰国女演员遭性侵案嫌犯落网，警方已申请羁押
items.desc: 泰国头条新闻社讯 4月3日上午，曼谷Khlong Tan警局警员将涉嫌性侵女演员的34岁男子尼功押送至曼谷南部刑事法院申请首次羁押。该男子涉嫌猥亵及性侵等相关罪名，目前警方已完成初步审讯程序。 据悉，该案件发生于3月31日凌晨，泰德混血模特兼演员克莉斯汀因服用药物产生不适反应，无法自主救援。随后，该男子以救援人员身份来到公寓，在克莉丝汀无法反抗的情况下对其实施了侵犯，并使用手机进行拍摄。4月1日，克莉丝汀第一时间前往Khlong Tan警局报案，并提交了事发时所穿的睡衣作为关键证据。 据警方通报，该男子涉嫌在受害人无法反抗的情况下实施猥亵与性侵行为，涉及威胁与暴力情节，曼谷南部刑事法院于4月1日签发逮捕令，目前案件仍在深入调查中。 在押送过程中，该男子全程未回应媒体提问，神情紧张。鉴于案件性质严重且舆论关注度高，警方已向法院明确提出反对保释，认为一旦释放，可能存在干扰证据及影响案件审理的风险。 （编译：jinda；审校：wan） The post 泰国女演员遭性侵案嫌犯落网，警方已申请羁押 appeared first on 泰国头条新闻 .

items.title: 泰国女Rapper MILLI惊艳韩国！斩获知名说唱比赛第四创历史
items.desc: 泰国头条新闻社讯 近日，韩国人气说唱竞演节目Show Me The Money Season 12圆满落幕。泰国女Rapper MILLI成功闯入总决赛，成为节目史上首位晋级决赛的外国选手，并最终获得第四名，创下历史纪录。 在4月2日的决赛舞台上，MILLI先是在全球投票中斩获第一，随后带来极具冲击力的表演。她以“MSG”（Money Stage Glory / Master Still Growing）为主题，将泰式恰恰恰节奏融合进嘻哈音乐，呈现出独特且富有感染力的舞台效果。 演出中，韩国Rapper Omega Sapien惊喜助阵，“厨师MILLI”的创意造型与高能舞台设计相结合，进一步点燃现场氛围，展现出强烈的个人风格与国际化表达。 最终，在综合各渠道投票后，MILLI以第四名收官。本次成绩不仅实现个人突破，也标志着泰国音乐人在韩国主流说唱舞台上的重要进展。 （编译：jinda；审校：wan；来源：pptvhd36） The post 泰国女Rapper MILLI惊艳韩国！斩获知名说唱比赛第四创历史 appeared first on 泰国头条新闻 .

items.title: Thai woman hires friend to kill her ex-boyfriend before taking her life
items.desc: Thai woman hires friend to kill her ex-boyfriend before taking her life Legacy A Thai woman and her friend, who was in unrequited love with her, allegedly arranged the murder of her ex-boyfriend on the M6 motorway in Nakhon Ratchasima on March 28. The woman took her own life while escaping from police. The victim, 30 year old Suppakorn “Golf” Traiphopklang, was found dead on the motorway with multiple gunshot wounds to his body. Police reviewed CCTV footage and found that two suspects fled the scene in a white Mitsubishi Pajero SUV. Investigators later identified the suspects as 28 year old Ku

items.title: Thailand News | Diesel hike hits drivers again as Thai subsidy support shrinks, Music video credit row deepens as rapper points to ChatGPT chat
items.desc: Thailand News | Diesel hike hits drivers again as Thai subsidy support shrinks, Music video credit row deepens as rapper points to ChatGPT chat The Thaiger Today we’ll be talking about how Thai diesel subsidies are shrinking, costing drivers more at the pumps, in ASEAN news the Philippines has secured passage of energy deliveries through the strait of Hormuz, plus, police in Pattaya have launched a sweep of walking street to round up ladyboys who have been ‘harassing tourists,’ then there’s been a raid on a Bangkok school that had been employing at least 10 teachers working without proper perm

items.title: Three boys rescued from child begging ring in Nakhon Pathom
items.desc: Three boys rescued from child begging ring in Nakhon Pathom Legacy A husband and wife were arrested in Nakhon Pathom yesterday, April 2, after police uncovered an alleged child begging gang operation and rescued three boys from years of exploitation. The two suspects, 36 year old Artorn and 32 year old Pimwimon, were arrested in Takong subdistrict, Mueang district, Nakhon Pathom, under Criminal Court warrants dated March 11. They were accused of human trafficking for forced begging, along with unlawfully exploiting children through coercion and threats. Photo via MGR Online Police said the pai

items.title: Phuket to raise boat fares to Koh Phi Phi and tour package prices from April 5
items.desc: Phuket to raise boat fares to Koh Phi Phi and tour package prices from April 5 Legacy Phuket ferry and speedboat fares for routes to Koh Phi Phi, along with boat tour prices, are set to increase from April 5 after operators received approval to raise charges in response to higher fuel costs . Phuket Provincial Governor Nirat Pongsitthaworn met officials from the Phuket Provincial Marine Department and local operators at about 1.30pm yesterday, April 2, to discuss rising operating costs linked to fuel prices. Operators told officials they had been absorbing the higher costs since fuel prices in

items.title: Homeless man held after stone attack on bar owners in Pattaya
items.desc: Homeless man held after stone attack on bar owners in Pattaya Legacy Two beer bar owners were injured after a homeless man threw stones at their motorbike in Pattaya yesterday, April 2, while they were riding home on Khao Phra Tamnak Road in Nong Prue, Bang Lamung district, Chon Buri. Police from Pattaya City Police Station said they were called to the scene, where rescue volunteers from Sawang Boriboon Thammasathan Pattaya were also sent to assist. Police found two injured beer bar owners at the scene. The first was 49 year old Preedee, who suffered a cut to the face and bruising. The second

items.title: 泰国商业部多项目助力“本地好物走向全球”
items.desc: 泰国头条新闻社讯 4月2日，泰国商业部国际贸易促进厅（DITP）表示，作为负责连接泰国业者与全球市场的部门，DITP计划以“THINK THAILAND NEXT LEVEL”为概念，通过各种项目和平台，持续推动泰国商品和服务升级。现如今，将新产品打造成世界级品牌不能只追求质量，还应该关注思维方式、产品开发，以及进入合适市场的时机。 为此，DITP推出“泰国好物走向全球”项目，帮助泰国潜力商品站上世界舞台，包括： 1. 组织“SMEs Pro-active”和“U-NEXT Exporter”等活动，让业者有机会交流开拓海外市场的经验，并支持他们参加国际贸易活动，增加建立网络和拓展全球业务的机会。 2. 通过“DEmark”和“Talent Thai & Designers’ Room”平台展示产品故事，帮助传统手工艺或地方产品经良好设计和包装，延伸成符合全球市场需求的Lifestyle商品。 3. 带领泰国商品参加THAIFEX – Anuga Asia、THAIFEX – HOREX Asia或Bangkok Gems & Jewelry Fair等展会，让泰国品牌有机会测试市场、接触真实买家和扩大业务。另外，通过Thaitrade.com平台提供持续接触外国客户的另一条渠道。 4. DITP还将举办工作坊和业者能力提升培训，例如： &#

items.title: Burmese mother confesses to killing 7 year old daughter in Bangkok
items.desc: Burmese mother confesses to killing 7 year old daughter in Bangkok Legacy Police arrested a Burmese woman on Koh Larn in Chon Buri yesterday, April 2, after she killed her seven year old daughter at a house in Min Buri district, Bangkok. The case came to light on Tuesday, March 31, when a Burmese grandmother brought the seven year old child, identified as Su, to Synphaet Seriruk Hospital. She initially told medical staff she did not know the cause of the girl’s death. Doctors found marks consistent with strangulation on the girl’s neck and reported the case to Min Buri Police Station due

items.title: Six Cambodians held in Trat crab meat smuggling case
items.desc: Six Cambodians held in Trat crab meat smuggling case Legacy A joint maritime operation in Trat intercepted a Cambodian boat allegedly involved in crab meat smuggling yesterday, April 2, seizing multiple crates of picked crab meat and detaining six Cambodian crew members . Reporters said the special investigation task force of the Thai Maritime Enforcement Command Centre Region 1 worked with related agencies to launch the operation in waters off Khlong Yai district. The operation targeted marine smuggling, said to have posed a threat to Thailand’s maritime security and economy, in line with gov

items.title: 攀牙荣登全球“旅行者点评奖”第一名！
items.desc: 泰国头条新闻社讯 4月2日，泰国安达曼海岸边的美丽天堂“攀牙”于近日力压全球众多知名城市，拿下了Booking.com“旅行者点评奖”（Traveller Review Awards 2026）第一名。这个成绩来自全球3.7亿条真实评论，充分证明泰国旅游业已经彻底摆脱“去了没感觉”的问题。“攀牙”把泰国人热情好客的DNA，与文化和美食等软实力完美结合，让游客感到安全、安心，仿佛回到了第二个家。豪华酒店到处都能盖，但这种真诚的感受和深入当地生活的体验，在别的地方找不到。 这项世界级殊荣并非偶然，背后是泰国旅游业一次重要的自我升级，通过“泰国魅力”与“未来科技”的巧妙融合，达到了非常自然的效果。Booking.com的主管指出，泰国业者很擅长从游客评论中听取意见，不断改进服务，总是能走在趋势前面。对于正渴望一场疗愈之旅、想要有意义且难忘的旅行体验，不妨收拾行李直接到攀牙去感受世界级的热情。 “旅行者点评奖”已经连续举办第14年，Booking.com汇集全球游客的真实评论，评选出带来难忘体验的旅游目的地，同时表扬令人印象深刻的服务提供商。2026年，泰国共有16692家旅游相关业者获奖，平均得分高达8.8分。 2026年“旅行者点评奖”前10名如下： 1. 泰国攀牙 2. 墨西哥伊达尔戈 3. 加拿大纽芬兰与拉布拉多 4. 西班牙纳瓦拉 5. 美国爱达荷 6. 印度喜马偕尔邦 7. 德
